creator: rob2g2-freebsd@bitbert.com
text:
I have successfully configured my sound system, and so far it is working, however, after some time it stops working.

It is a Realtek ALC1220 chip that comes with a Gigabyte x570 Aorus Ultra.

symptom: after some time the sound stops. syslogd goes to 100% CPU logging VLC logs. vlc can playback videos, however, I cannot skip to a position in a stream any more - the process hangs.

dmesg says:
pcm4: chn_write(): pcm4:virtual:dsp4.vp0: play interrupt timeout, channel dead

vlc logs to syslog:
Feb 12 15:24:19 mach2020 vlc[31719]: main: picture is too late to be displayed (missing 34 ms)
Feb 12 15:24:19 mach2020 vlc[31719]: oss: cannot write samples: Invalid argument
Feb 12 15:24:49 mach2020 syslogd: last message repeated 8896062 times
Feb 12 15:26:28 mach2020 syslogd: last message repeated 29742997 times
